title: Electrode Cleaning Solution Preparation
author: Michael Economo
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8pwhvpe

steps.title: Make 1
steps.instruction: Make 1.2X strength cleaning solution (167.67 mL) First, measure 116.67 mL H 2 O in beaker Add: 0.117 g NaCl 10 mL 10% SDS 50 mL 0.2 M Tris Buffer, pH 8.5

steps.title: [On day of use] Add 2...
steps.instruction: [On day of use] Add 2 mL 10X trypsin to 10 mL 1.2X cleaning solution to make 12 mL 1x cleaning solution
